creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

is the maintainer of this port still unreachable via email? (submitter emailed me and told me that maintainer was not able to  
get email from freebsd.org, he did this back in August) 

I suggest that someone who wants to maintain this port contact me and we can make sure there is a patch that will actually  
turn this into a slave port of mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin.  that way, this port only needs to include the ja* specific fixes. I  
will mentor someone if they have some pr/patching experience and maintain at least one other port, or have supplied other  
ports with correctly formatted patches. 

We can work together so that ja* slave can quickly follow behing p5-Mail-SpamAssassin.
